body:
This PR fixes the latent heat bug discovered by @jbphyswx in our buoyancy gradients.  

It would be great to rewrite parts of that file to get rid of the getter functions at the top and the bg_model, and to reduce the number of functions we define. But maybe we can do it in the next PRs.
title: Fix bg_gradient lh bug

body:
## Purpose 
Use cached values to avoid doing extra work in the kernel.


## Content
The changes selectively add back use of cached variables that were removed en masse by Charlie a while back.  Upon profiling with NVidia's NSight tools, we now understand that some of that caching is valuable to avoid "global" (from the GPU's perspective) memory reads.


----
- [X] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Improve performance of CUDA kernels generated from manual_sparse_jacobian
